data.title: Aramis Group discloses transactions on own shares from Jan 19-23, 2026.
data.description: The number of new COVID-19 cases reported globally in the last 24 hours has reached over 300,000. The death toll from the virus has surpassed 4.5 million, with over 180 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States continues to lead in both cases and deaths, with over 33 million confirmed cases and 600,000 deaths. Vaccination efforts are ongoing, with over 2.5 billion doses administered globally. Despite this, concerns remain about the spread of new variants and uneven vaccination distribution, particularly in low-income countries.

data.title: JLL Partners buys PowerParts Group, supplying replacement parts for gas and steam turbines.
data.description: A New York-based middle market private equity firm known as JLL Partners has recently completed the acquisition of PowerParts Group (PPG), a company specializing in supplying critical replacement parts and field services for gas and steam power turbines. PPG delivers advanced aftermarket components to utilities, MRO service providers, and turbine OEMs, playing a vital role in the safe and efficient operation of such power equipment. JLL Partners targets investments in sectors such as healthcare, industrials, and business services.

data.title: Sotheby's International Realty expands in Oregon, making strides with subsidiaries. Correction issued on 26-Jan-2026.
data.description: According to a recent news announcement, Sotheby's International Realty is increasing its presence in Oregon. The press release, released on January 26, 2026, revealed that both entities are subsidiaries of the same corporation.

data.title: Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: HCACU) to allow separate trading of Class A shares and rights from Jan 27, 2026. Class A shares to trade as "HCAC" and rights as "HCACR" on Nasdaq Global Market. Units will still trade as "HCACU".
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Hall Chadwick Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: HCACU) revealed that starting from January 27, 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company's initial public offering will have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and rights that come with the units. The separated Class A ordinary shares and rights will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market using the symbols "HCAC" and "HCACR," respectively. Units that are not separated will persist in trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "HCACU."

data.title: Ripple joins forces with Riyadh Bank unit, emphasizing rising institutional interest in blockchain for payments and custody.
data.description: The partnership between Ripple and Riyad Bank sheds light on the increasing institutional fascination with blockchain technology for various financial services, such as cross-border payments, secure asset storage, and digitizing assets, within the international financial sector. This collaboration signifies the growing emphasis on blockchain solutions in financial institutions worldwide.

data.title: Snapt Beverages and UFC champion Rose Namajunas launch Nama Water at UFC 324, expanding to 100+ retail stores in Q2 2026.
data.description: Making its first appearance at UFC 324, a new product is set to increase its presence significantly by expanding distribution to over 100 retail stores in the early months of the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: 10X Health System and Verséa Discovery introduce 10X MitoScreen™ for advanced mitochondrial assessment, providing insights for optimized energy and metabolism.
data.description: An innovative mitochondrial evaluation tool has been developed to enhance advanced cellular testing, providing valuable information for optimizing energy, metabolism, and personalized performance. Based in SCOTTSDALE, Arizona, the company behind this advancement, 10X Health System, specializes in precision wellness. The development was announced on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Inventor from Utah creates BIODEGRADABLE A C FILTER to reduce waste in landfills and improve air quality.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 26, 2026, an inventor from South Jordan, Utah, shared the creation of a biodegradable HVAC system filter to minimize waste in landfills. Named the BIODEGRADABLE A C FILTER, the innovative design aims to enhance air quality in homes and businesses. The inventor's motivation was to address environmental concerns by introducing a sustainable solution.

data.title: US market structure bill, crypto regulation work postponed due to winter storm; Senate and gov offices shut amid severe weather.
data.description: The United States Senate and other government offices were forced to close on Monday due to severe storm conditions in the country.

data.title: Meta's stock is rising as Q4 earnings approach, Wall Street predicts solid revenue growth amidst AI expense concerns.
data.description: Investors on Wall Street are anticipating a robust increase in revenue, although there is some apprehension regarding the expenses related to Artificial Intelligence. The stock of Meta is rising as they prepare to announce their earnings for the fourth quarter. It is important to keep an eye on the specific numbers for this quarter.
